# Implementation Prompt

Implement MealCraft according to the approved specification, constitution, plan, and task list.

Requirements:

- Use Next.js App Router
- Use TypeScript Strict Mode
- Use Tailwind CSS
- Use MongoDB
- Use NextAuth or Clerk
- Follow reusable component patterns
- Use server components whenever possible

Generate production-quality code.

Create:

- Pages
- Layouts
- Components
- API routes
- Database models
- Authentication flows
- Validation logic

Ensure all code follows the project constitution.
